languages.text: Ведка Дунавски выглядит умиротворенной. Ее глаза закрыты, а руки мирно покоятся на груди.
Vedka Dunawski looks to be at peace. Her eyes are shut and her hands are folded serenely over her chest.
languages.original_text: Ведка Дунавски выглядит умиротворенной. Ее глаза закрыты, а руки мирно покоятся на груди.

traits.locale_text: Vedka Dunawski looks at peace. Her eyes are shut, and her hands are folded peacefully over her chest.
Vedka Dunawski looks at peace. Her eyes are shut, and her hands are folded peacefully over her chest.
Vedka Dunawski looks to be at peace. Her eyes are shut and her hands are folded serenely over her chest.
Vedka Dunawski looks to be at peace. Her eyes are shut and her hands are folded serenely over her chest.

languages.text: 薇德卡·杜纳芙斯卡看上去很安详。她双目紧闭，双手平静地交叠在胸前。
languages.original_text: Vedka Dunawski looks to be at peace. Her eyes are shut and her hands are folded serenely over her chest.

traits.locale_text: 薇德卡·杜纳芙斯卡看上去很安详。她双目紧闭，双手平静地交叠在胸前。

languages.text: Vedka Dunawski huzur içinde görünüyor. Gözleri kapalı, elleriyse göğsünün üzerinde dingin bir şekilde kavuşmuş.
languages.original_text: Vedka Dunawski looks to be at peace. Her eyes are shut and her hands are folded serenely over her chest.

traits.locale_text: Vedka Dunawski huzur içinde görünüyor. Gözleri kapalı, elleriyse göğsünün üzerinde dingin bir şekilde kavuşmuş.

languages.text: Vedka Dunawski semble reposer en paix, les yeux fermés et les mains croisées sereinement sur sa poitrine.
languages.original_text: Vedka Dunawski looks to be at peace. Her eyes are shut and her hands are folded serenely over her chest.

traits.locale_text: Vedka Dunawski semble reposer en paix, les yeux fermés et les mains croisées sereinement sur sa poitrine.

languages.text: Vedka Dunawski parece estar en paz. Tiene los ojos cerrados y las manos entrelazadas con serenidad sobre el pecho.
languages.original_text: Vedka Dunawski looks to be at peace. Her eyes are shut and her hands are folded serenely over her chest.

traits.locale_text: Vedka Dunawski parece estar en paz. Tiene los ojos cerrados y las manos entrelazadas con serenidad sobre el pecho.

languages.text: Vedka Dunawski wirkt friedlich. Ihre Augen sind geschlossen, die Hände ruhen auf ihrer Brust.
languages.original_text: Vedka Dunawski looks to be at peace. Her eyes are shut and her hands are folded serenely over her chest.

traits.locale_text: Vedka Dunawski wirkt friedlich. Ihre Augen sind geschlossen, die Hände ruhen auf ihrer Brust.

languages.text: ヴェドカ・ドゥナフスキーは、安らかに見える。その目は閉じられ、両手は静かに胸の上で組まれている。
languages.original_text: Vedka Dunawski looks to be at peace. Her eyes are shut and her hands are folded serenely over her chest.

traits.locale_text: ヴェドカ・ドゥナフスキーは、安らかに見える。その目は閉じられ、両手は静かに胸の上で組まれている。
